title: Vessel of Malice
body:
**Vessel Of Malice**

Step into the world of Jujutsu Kaisen with the Sukuna's Vessel mod for Minecraft! This mod transforms your gameplay by allowing you to become the vessel of Ryomen Sukuna, the King of Curses. Harness his formidable powers, unleash devastating techniques, and seek out the mysterious Sukuna's Finger.

Requires:
Kleiders Custom Renderer
PlayerAnimator
 

You Get The Finger Of Sukuna By Fishing.

Features:

Becoming Sukuna's Vessel:

Upon installing the mod, players can become the vessel of Sukuna, gaining access to his powerful curse techniques.
Techniques:

Dismantle: Unleash a slicing attack that can cleave through enemies and blocks with ease. This ability allows you to deal massive damage to any target in your path.
Cleave: A more focused and powerful version of Dismantle, Cleave delivers a concentrated strike that can cut through the toughest foes and materials, leaving a trail of destruction.
